displayTitle: The Fan Every Lift-Off Curve Draws
kicker: ET LEVEL I // GENERATING LIFT-OFF CURVES

beats.narration: Last lab you swept the metal. This lab freezes the sample and sweeps the gap, the coil-to-surface spacing. No surface signal is stronger or faster.

payload.title: GENERATING LIFT-OFF CURVES
payload.sub: Hold the sample still and vary the gap.

beats.narration: Open the gap and coupling weakens. Eddy currents shrink, so reactance climbs back toward air while resistance falls away. That retrace is lift-off.

payload.sub: Reactance climbs, resistance falls — back toward the air point.

beats.narration: Touch five samples and lift each. The traces fan out, every curve heading for one air point. The first tenth-millimeter does most of the moving.

payload.heading: Five materials, one air point
payload.note: EVERY LIFT-OFF CURVE CONVERGES ON THE AIR POINT

beats.narration: That makes lift-off villain and tool. Hand wobble swamps a crack, yet that same dot motion measures coating thickness when the gap is your signal.

chips.s: One axis on the impedance plane

beats.narration: So inspectors rotate lift-off flat. Wobble stays horizontal; cracks break upward into the vertical channel. Re-null and re-rotate on every new material.

payload.sub: Change material, re-null and re-rotate — the angle moves.
